'''Calenz''' was the name of a [[Telgorn shipyard]] operated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in the [[Nocto system/Legends|Nocto system]]. It was attacked by the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance (Executor-class)|''Vengeance'']] during the [[Battle of Nocto]].<ref name="XWvTF:BoP" />

{{Station-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
